summary: The 'Check Changelog Entry' CI job failed because the PR targets v1.16 but does not include a changelog entry in the .changes/v1.16 folder.
root_cause: The workflow marked the run as failed because the PR would target v1.16 and no changelog entry was found in .changes/v1.16.

evidence.quote: ##[error]Currently this PR would target a v1.16 release. Please add a changelog entry for in the .changes/v1.16 folder, or discuss which release you'd like to target with …
evidence.reason: Explicit CI error message stating the PR targets v1.16 and instructing to add a changelog entry in .changes/v1.16.
Shows the action explicitly set the job as failed (the failure was reported by the check logic).

suggested_fix: Add a changelog entry for this PR in the .changes/v1.16 folder, or update/discuss the intended target release for the PR so the check is satisfied.

summary: A Dependabot update run failed when a container command exited with code 1; Dependabot reported "The updater encountered one or more errors."
root_cause: A container run failed: the command '/bin/sh -c $DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-…' exited with code 1, which caused the updater to report errors.

evidence.quote: Failure running container 4d986eac50248057b7f3fa031163542ffb36990efbcff66eb3aed0e408c150fa: Error: Command failed with exit code 1: /bin/sh -c $DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-…
evidence.reason: Directly shows a container run failed with an exit code 1 executing the Dependabot command.

evidence.quote: Error: The updater encountered one or more errors.
evidence.reason: Shows Dependabot reported an error during execution, consistent with the container command failure.

evidence.quote: Dependabot encountered '1' error(s) during execution, please check the logs for more details.
evidence.reason: Confirms the updater observed an error and advises checking logs for details.
Shows the system recorded an update job error after the failure.

suggested_fix: Inspect the logs for container 4d986eac50248057b7f3fa031163542ffb36990efbcff66eb3aed0e408c150fa and the full stdout/stderr of the command '/bin/sh -c $DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-…' to see why it exited with code 1; reproduce the command locally or in CI to capture the underlying error and fix the failing command or environment (e.g., missing binary, permissions, or bad arguments).

summary: The documentation build failed due to a SyntaxError raised while converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to MDX; the job is configured to fail on warnings as well.
root_cause: A SyntaxError occurred during conversion of ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format (raised in resolve_autodoc), causing the docs build to fail.

evidence.reason: Shows a parsing error occurred during the conversion process.

evidence.quote: SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: Explicitly identifies the file that failed to convert to MDX due to a SyntaxError.
Indicates the error was raised during the autodoc resolution step that converts content to MDX.

evidence.quote: Doc build failed because warnings were emitted (fail_on_warning=true).
evidence.reason: Shows the documentation build treats warnings as errors, which will cause failure if warnings exist alongside the SyntaxError.
The CI checks explicitly grep for this warning text, suggesting warnings of this form may be present and treated as errors.
Confirms the job terminated with a non-zero exit code due to the failure.

suggested_fix: Open ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md and fix the invalid syntax that causes the SyntaxError (e.g., malformed Python code block or MDX markup). Re-run the documentation build locally to reproduce the error. Also inspect the docs build log for 'Bare assert found in runnable:' warnings (the job uses fail_on_warning=true) and resolve those warnings so the build does not fail on them.

summary: The CI failed when attempting to push a branch to GitHub: the git push command exited with code 128 after GitHub returned an HTTP 403 error, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: git push failed because GitHub returned HTTP 403 (access denied) when attempting to access https://github.com/vercel/next.js/, causing the git command to exit with code 128.

evidence.quote: Error: Command failed with exit code 128 (Unknown system error -128): git push origin update/react/19.3.0-canary-142cfde8-20260422
evidence.reason: Shows the failing command was git push and it exited with code 128.

evidence.quote: "fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/': The requested URL returned error: 403"
evidence.reason: Demonstrates GitHub returned an HTTP 403 (permission/authorization) error when accessing the repository URL.
Corroborates the git command failure and the reported exit code name associated with the push failure.

suggested_fix: Ensure the CI has valid credentials with push/write permission for the repository (e.g., configure GITHUB_TOKEN or a personal access token with repo access and make sure it's available to the job), verify the remote URL is correct and authenticated, and re-run the workflow.
